_comment: Merge these into the host app's package.json as needed.

scripts.dancecard:import-paf26-all: node scripts/dancecard-import-schedule.mjs --slug paf26 --json data/paf26-program-slots.json && node scripts/dancecard-import-staff.mjs --slug paf26 --json data/paf26-staff-volunteer-shifts.json

dependencies._note: EastCoast dancecard also relied on the main app stack: next@14, react@18, @supabase/ssr, @supabase/supabase-js, zod, date-fns, date-fns-tz, bcryptjs, nanoid, @dnd-kit/core, @dnd-kit/utilities, tailwind (site styles). Organizer grid uses @dnd-kit. ICS uses no extra package.

devDependencies._note: Import scripts use dotenv, xlsx (devDependency in original repo for parsers).
